name: Subscription Pricing Data MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing subscription pricing data for 50+ software services — enabling AI agents to look up and compare pricing plans across major SaaS and subscription products. Supports competitive pricing research, budget planning, and market intelligence workflows.
use_cases: Comparing SaaS subscription pricing across competitors from market research agents
Looking up current pricing plans for budget planning from procurement agents
Building pricing intelligence dashboards from competitive analysis agents
Answering pricing questions about common software tools from assistant agents
not_for: Real-time pricing guarantees (subscription pricing changes frequently)
Negotiated enterprise pricing (public plan pricing only)
best_when: A product manager, marketer, or procurement specialist wants AI agents to quickly look up and compare subscription pricing across major software tools — enabling data-driven vendor selection and competitive analysis.
avoid_when: You need real-time pricing guarantees or comprehensive coverage beyond 50 services. Always verify pricing with the vendor before committing.

auth.notes: No auth required for pricing data queries. Data stored locally or fetched from public sources.

pricing.notes: Free open source. Pricing data may not be real-time — verify before committing.

known_agent_gotchas: Pricing data has a freshness date — always verify with vendor before committing
Only covers 50+ services — not comprehensive for all software categories
Enterprise pricing and negotiated discounts not reflected
Price data quality depends on how recently the database was updated
agent_readiness.security_notes: Read-only pricing data. No auth required. No sensitive data. Low security risk. Verify pricing accuracy before financial decisions.

security_score_components.security_notes: Static pricing data. No auth. No sensitive data. Verify before financial decisions.
